reviews.comment:
Vergonzoso la atención de Paola , me niega un edulcorante y atiende un conocido suyo y me deja esperando después que le había pagado un café con leche y encima cuando llego al auto era solo café
Dejé queja en un cuaderno común que me dio sin rubricar y muy desprolijo
No voy massssss

(Translated by Google)
Paola's service was shameful. She refused to give me a sweetener and instead served me with an acquaintance, leaving me waiting after I'd paid for a latte. And then, when I got to my car, it was just coffee! I left a complaint in a plain, unsigned, and very sloppy notebook she gave me. I'm never going back!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNENU5yRl9BRRAB
